scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock'].forEach((f)=>{try{fs.rmSync(f,{force:true});}catch{}}); const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; const isCI=process.env.CI||process.env.RENDER; if(!isCI&&!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')){console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1);}"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
